import{createClient}from'@supabase/supabase-js';const supabaseUrl=process.env.REACT_APP_SUPABASE_URL||'';const supabaseAnonKey=process.env.REACT_APP_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY||'';if(!supabaseUrl||!supabaseAnonKey){console.warn('[Emperor] Supabase env vars missing. Check your .env file.');}export const supabase=createClient(supabaseUrl,supabaseAnonKey,{auth:{storageKey:'emperor-auth',autoRefreshToken:true,persistSession:true,detectSessionInUrl:true,// Prevent "Lock broken by another request" errors when multiple tabs are open
lock:async(_name,_acquireTimeout,fn)=>{return fn();}}});
